goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Exact action-button containment is the correct semantic form contract. All 19 text-filtered occurrences share one root cause and must be replaced together, resolving each runtime form once with strict count one.

worker_package.objective: Add one exact button-containment actionForm helper, replace all 19 broad action-form text scopes, then complete all independent browser and persistence gates.
verify: Add actionForm using form containment of page.getByRole button exact accessible name; no hasText/CSS/name/position/force.
Replace all 19 scopes across Combine, Move, Freeze, Thaw, Correct, Split, Discard, two Restore phases, and Donate; resolve ten runtime forms once and assert count one.
Preserve every input/select/click/exact button/mutation/assertion/fixture/timeout/other locator; require zero affected hasText scopes.
Run scoped format/lint and one-file mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow with all actions, three axe/overflow/screenshots, no browser errors.
Release port, fresh prepare, run integrated workflow with 400/350/50, provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/dbcheck, release port, record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any semantic action form is not uniquely resolved.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: Freeze text scope resolved a hidden control through inherited descendant text.
Sibling action forms expose unique exact accessible button names.
There are exactly 19 affected occurrences and ten runtime resolutions.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, DB, artifacts, and port require serial lifecycles.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
